steps.title: Identify the pattern shape
steps.content: The scatterplot points form an approximately linear increasing pattern, so the model should be linear with a positive slope.

steps.title: Check a representative value
steps.content:
For the linear model $y=-582+1.2x$, at $x=3500$:
$$
y=-582+1.2(3500)=3618
$$
This is close to the plotted value near $3700$.

steps.title: Reject mismatched models
steps.content: The model $y=582-1.2x$ decreases, while the scatterplot increases. The exponential models do not match the roughly straight pattern. The answer is A.
